item.title: A Holocaust Survivor’s First Miracle
item.description: A firsthand Holocaust account reflecting on survival, faith, and the first moment of hope during a time of extreme hardship.

media:content.media:title: A Holocaust Survivor’s First Miracle
media:content.media:description: A firsthand Holocaust account reflecting on survival, faith, and the first moment of hope during a time of extreme hardship.

item.title: Surviving Four Camps Beyond German Forces
item.description: A veteran’s account of survival through four camps and the hardships endured beyond German forces.

media:content.media:title: Surviving Four Camps Beyond German Forces
media:content.media:description: A veteran’s account of survival through four camps and the hardships endured beyond German forces.

item.title: A Tribute to America’s WWI Heroes
item.description: A respectful tribute to America’s World War I heroes and the service members who left for war and never came home.

media:content.media:title: A Tribute to America’s WWI Heroes
media:content.media:description: A respectful tribute to America’s World War I heroes and the service members who left for war and never came home.

item.title: WWII Veteran Bud Gahs Remembered
item.description: A birthday tribute to WWII veteran Lockered “Bud” Gahs, who served with the 42nd Infantry Division, earned the Bronze Star, and witnessed Dachau’s liberation.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Bud Gahs Remembered
media:content.media:description: A birthday tribute to WWII veteran Lockered “Bud” Gahs, who served with the 42nd Infantry Division, earned the Bronze Star, and witnessed Dachau’s liberation.

item.title: Before the Army Arrived, They Went In Alone
item.description: A historical look at men who moved ahead of the Army, showing courage, initiative, and the risks faced in wartime service.

media:content.media:title: Before the Army Arrived, They Went In Alone
media:content.media:description: A historical look at men who moved ahead of the Army, showing courage, initiative, and the risks faced in wartime service.

item.title: The Moment I Knew I Would Die
item.description: A firsthand wartime reflection from a World War II American Army veteran, sharing a moment of fear, survival, and service.

media:content.media:title: The Moment I Knew I Would Die
media:content.media:description: A firsthand wartime reflection from a World War II American Army veteran, sharing a moment of fear, survival, and service.

item.title: WWII Veteran Reunited With His Browning Rifle
item.description: Robert Shipe, a WWII Army veteran, is reunited with the Browning Automatic Rifle he carried across Europe, in a moving moment of remembrance.

media:content.media:title: WWII Veteran Reunited With His Browning Rifle
media:content.media:description: Robert Shipe, a WWII Army veteran, is reunited with the Browning Automatic Rifle he carried across Europe, in a moving moment of remembrance.

item.title: Rocky Bleier on Vietnam War Injuries
item.description: Rocky Bleier, 4x Super Bowl champion and Vietnam veteran, reflects on the severe injuries he sustained in combat and the impact on his life.

media:content.media:title: Rocky Bleier on Vietnam War Injuries
media:content.media:description: Rocky Bleier, 4x Super Bowl champion and Vietnam veteran, reflects on the severe injuries he sustained in combat and the impact on his life.

item.title: Why Vietnam and WWII Vets Differ
item.description: A respectful look at how Vietnam and World War II veterans experienced service differently, shaped by different eras, missions, and homecoming experiences.

media:content.media:title: Why Vietnam and WWII Vets Differ
media:content.media:description: A respectful look at how Vietnam and World War II veterans experienced service differently, shaped by different eras, missions, and homecoming experiences.

item.title: Rudy Meekins Reflects on Four Purple Hearts
item.description: Rudy Meekins recalls the Korean War and the four Purple Hearts he earned, reflecting on the battles and the lasting cost of service.

media:content.media:title: Rudy Meekins Reflects on Four Purple Hearts
media:content.media:description: Rudy Meekins recalls the Korean War and the four Purple Hearts he earned, reflecting on the battles and the lasting cost of service.

item.title: The Crucible of Brotherhood in Navy SEALs
item.description: A look at the brotherhood and training that shape Navy SEALs, reflecting service, endurance, and the bonds forged through shared challenge.

media:content.media:title: The Crucible of Brotherhood in Navy SEALs
media:content.media:description: A look at the brotherhood and training that shape Navy SEALs, reflecting service, endurance, and the bonds forged through shared challenge.
